name: FUHATSU

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: "Who's Side is He On!?"
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it must attempt a TN 8 Wp duel. If it passes, it may declare a (c) action. If it fails, it must declare a (c) action controlled by the opponent.

actions.name: Gatling Gun
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target does not have cover, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Rage
triggers.text: Target gains a Burning token and moves 3" away from this model.

triggers.name: "I Meant to Do That!"
triggers.text: After failing, the next action this model declares this activation receives +2 Skl.

actions.name: Take Cover
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Friendly only. Target gains a Shielded token.

actions.name: Target Practice
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. X is equal to the distance between this model and target Scheme marker. Remove the target.

extraction_notes: Target Practice has 'X' in the TN column, which the card indicates is equal to the distance between the model and target Scheme marker
Take Cover's costs_and_restrictions combines both the friendly-only restriction and the Shielded token effect as they appear on one line in italic text
